title: Wearable Villager Hats
description: Adds villager hats as renamed pumpkins. Does not require OptiFine or any other mods.
body:
This resource pack does not require OptiFine or any other mods.
![All the hats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f2ae25f85c64f12fd5133dba8378f55b141a65e.jpeg)
Renaming a carved pumpkin changes its model to one of the hats.
![Renaming a carved pumpkin changes its model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1dc3559226c35a321a67d1b7e24eaddd542c0577.jpeg)

List of all supported names:
- Armorer hat
- Butcher hat
- Cartographer hat
- Desert hat
- Farmer hat
- Fisherman hat
- Fletcher hat
- Librarian hat
- Savanna hat
- Shepherd hat
- Snow hat
- Swamp hat
- Weaponsmith hat
